text:
👶 Cliqk – Child Safety Policy

At Cliqk, the safety and well-being of children on our platform is a top priority. We are fully committed to maintaining a secure and respectful environment for all users, especially minors. Any content or behavior that endangers children is strictly prohibited and may lead to immediate account suspension or legal action.

🚫 Prohibited Content & Behavior

We do not allow content that exploits, abuses, or endangers children in any way. This includes but is not limited to:

  • Child sexual abuse materials (CSAM)

  • Grooming behavior, such as befriending a child online to facilitate inappropriate contact

  • Sexualization of minors, including imagery or content that encourages or promotes child exploitation

  • Sextortion, blackmail involving a child’s intimate images

  • Child trafficking, including advertising or solicitation for commercial sexual exploitation

  • Inappropriate interaction with children, such as touching or suggestive behavior

  • Apps appealing to children but containing adult themes, including excessive violence or harmful activities

⚠️ If You See Something, Say Something

If you encounter content or behavior on Cliqk that you believe puts a child at risk, please report it immediately using our in-app reporting tools or contact us directly at support@cliqkapp.com.

If you believe a child is in immediate danger, contact your local law enforcement and a trusted child protection organization.

✅ Our Safety Standards

To comply with Google Play’s Child Safety Standards, we have implemented the following measures:

  • Clear Guidelines: Our [Terms of Service] and [Community Guidelines] strictly prohibit any form of child sexual abuse or exploitation.

  • Reporting Mechanism: Users can report inappropriate content or behavior directly within the app.

  • Content Moderation: We take swift action against confirmed violations, including removal of content and notifying authorities where required.

  • Law Compliance: Cliqk complies with all applicable child protection laws and cooperates with official agencies like the National Center for Missing and Exploited Children (NCMEC).

  • Designated Safety Contact: We have a dedicated point of contact to handle child safety-related issues and work directly with platform compliance teams.

🧠 Educating and Empowering Our Community

We encourage parents and guardians to stay engaged and use available tools to monitor their child’s activity online. We also urge users to be mindful and report any suspicious or concerning behavior they may witness on the platform.

Together, we can ensure Cliqk remains a safe space for expression, connection, and creativity — without compromise.
